meaning: n.反光镜,[物]探视镜,取景器
examples: You are your cameras best viewfinder!
Imagine a tick-tack-toe grid in your viewfinder.
Look into the camera's viewfinder and frame the image.
Afterward, when I tapped on the viewfinder on the image of the coffee, it became sharp.
This is especially useful when using the camera with an optional viewfinder (sold separately).
